title: Newmont reports strong Q3 operating cash flow of $1B despite gold production dip, revises 2023 outlook
text: (Kitco News) - Newmont (NYSE: NEM) (TSX: NGT), the world's largest gold producer, announced today that its Q3 2023 attributable gold production decreased 13% y-o-y to 1.29 million ounces primarily due to lower production at Peñasquito, Akyem and Ahafo.

title: Newmont 3Q EPS falls short on weaker Mexico and Ghana output
text: Newmont Corporation on Thursday reported third-quarter 2023 adjusted earnings per share (EPS) of $0.36, missing the analyst consensus estimate of $0.43.  The world's biggest gold miner also saw its attributable gold production decline 13.4% year over year to 1.29 million ounces, due primarily to lower production at the Peñasquito mine in Mexico and the Akyem and Ahafo mines in Ghana.

title: Newmont (NEM) Q3 Earnings and Sales Fall Short of Estimates

title: Newmont Corporation (NEM) Q3 Earnings and Revenues Miss Estimates
text: Newmont Corporation (NEM) came out with quarterly earnings of $0.36 per share, missing the Zacks Consensus Estimate of $0.42 per share. This compares to earnings of $0.27 per share a year ago.

title: Newmont: An Opportunity To Buy At The Deepest Discount In Years
text: Newmont stock has dropped 56% from its 2022 high, creating a rare buying opportunity. Weak operational and financial results, as well as the pending merger with Newcrest, have contributed to the stock's recent decline. The second half of 2023 is expected to see improved performance and the company has a strong 5-year outlook.

title: Greatland Gold looking forward to working with Newmont at Havieron
text: Greatland Gold said the main decline at the Havieron mine development in Paterson, WA, now exceeds 2,000 metres. An update from partner Newcrest indicated shaft is now at 2,030 metres out of the 2,800 metres required to reach the base of the Permian cover.

title: Newmont Announces End of Strike at Peñasquito Mine in Mexico
text: DENVER--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Newmont Corporation (NYSE: NEM, TSX: NGT) announces it has reached a definitive agreement (“Agreement”) with the National Union of Mine, Metal, and Allied Workers of the Mexican Republic (the “Union”) to end the strike initiated by the Union on June 7, 2023, at the Company's Peñasquito mine located in the Mexican state of Zacatecas. title: Newcrest Mining investors strongly approve takeover by Newmont
text: Newcrest Mining Limited (ASX:NCM), Australia's biggest gold miner, announced on Friday that its shareholders overwhelmingly approved the company's acquisition by Newmont Corporation.  Newcrest said the takeover deal was passed by 92.63% of the votes cast by 84.74% of Newcrest shareholders.

title: Newmont (NEM) Shareholders Approve the Acquisition of Newcrest
text: Newmont (NEM) shareholders overwhelmingly approve the acquisition of Newcrest, creating a world-class portfolio of gold and copper assets.

title: Newcrest Announces Newmont Stockholders Approve Share Issuance for Scheme
text: Newmont stockholders approve issuance of Newmont shares for the Scheme Melbourne, Australia--(Newsfile Corp. - October 11, 2023) - Newcrest Mining Limited (ASX: NCM) (TSX: NCM) (PNGX: NCM) notes the press release issued by Newmont Corporation earlier today confirming that Newmont stockholders have approved the issuance of shares of Newmont common stock to Newcrest shareholders pursuant to the proposed scheme of arrangement (Scheme) at the meeting of Newmont stockholders. The Newmont stockholder approval condition contained in clause 3.1(h) of the Scheme Implementation Deed dated 15 May 2023 has now been satisfied.

title: Newmont Shareholders Vote Overwhelmingly to Approve Acquisition of Newcrest

title: Newmont Reached a Preliminary Agreement with Peñasquito Mine's Union
text: DENVER--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Newmont Corporation (NYSE: NEM, TSX: NGT) confirms it has reached a preliminary agreement with the National Union of Mine, Metal, and Allied Workers of the Mexican Republic (the Union) aiming to end the strike initiated by the Union on June 7, 2023 at Minera Peñasquito in the Mexican state of Zacatecas. The preliminary agreement was ratified by the General Assembly of the Union on October 5, 2023. This preliminary agreement is intended to be formalized into a definitive.

title: Newmont (NEM) Gets All Regulatory Approvals for Newcrest Buyout
text: Newmont (NEM) receives key regulatory approvals from Papua New Guinea and the Philippines for its proposed acquisition of Newcrest, marking a significant milestone in the transaction process.

title: Newmont's bid to acquire Newcrest gets all regulatory approvals
text: (Kitco News) - Newmont (NYSE: NEM) (TSX: NGT), the world's largest gold producer, announced today that the Securities Commission of Papua New Guinea cleared Newmont's proposed acquisition of major gold producer Newcrest Mining.

title: Newmont Cleared by PNG's Securities Commission to Proceed with Proposed Acquisition of Newcrest
text: DENVER--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Newmont Corporation (NYSE: NEM, TSX: NGT) announced that the Securities Commission of Papua New Guinea (SCPNG) has granted the necessary exemptions and other requested confirmations under PNG capital markets law to allow the Company to proceed with its proposed acquisition of Newcrest Mining Limited (ASX, TSX, PNGX: NCM). title: Newmont Announces Executive Leadership Appointments
text: DENVER--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Newmont Corporation (NYSE: NEM, TSX: NGT) today announced leadership appointments that will further strengthen its operating model to support safe and profitable operations of the expanded portfolio of assets and projects. As previously announced, Natascha Viljoen will be joining Newmont as Chief Operating Officer (COO) on October 2, 2023. After an onboarding period, Natascha will assume accountability for the Australian, North American, and Papua New Guinea (PNG) Busin.
